title: Gradeup is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Gradeup is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Gradeup invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Thane location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Gradeup:
Gradeup is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gradeup!
